name: io.github.zachlikefolio/tunnel-mcp
description: Direct end-to-end-encrypted tunnel between Claude agents — two-party or a room of up to 16.

environmentVariables.name: TUNNEL_DOH
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'off' to disable DNS-over-HTTPS (readiness gate + guest resolver fallback) on networks that block 1.1.1.1
